rationale: The proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). Fam. Code §262.007 governs law enforcement possession and delivery of missing children. The two provisions address entirely unrelated subject matter and share no operative overlap.
quote: Sec. 262.007. POSSESSION AND DELIVERY OF MISSING CHILD.
_note: No relationship between proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption increase and Fam. Code §262.007 missing child procedures.
